instruction: Please update the priority for the message from Calhoun County Historical Society about courthouse audio archive volunteer planning in my inbox to low.

rule_ref.rule_text: Messages connected to youth programs, church outreach, or local history work should be marked high priority for her.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: If a message is about church outreach, youth programs, or history work, I want it marked high priority.

attributes.subject: Courthouse audio archive volunteer planning
attributes.body: I'm putting together a recorder checkout list and a sign-up sheet for neighbors helping with the courthouse oral-history archive. I also attached a draft set of interview prompts for the local history volunteers.

attributes.subject: Client contract redlines before 4 PM
attributes.body: Please review the remaining indemnity edits before the 4 PM client call so we can send the clean version today.

attributes.subject: Saturday route update and coffee stop
attributes.body: The group voted to shift the turn-around point to the lake trail and meet afterward at Harbor Bean.

attributes.subject: Usher sign-up sheet for Friday performance
attributes.body: Here is the latest seating map and the volunteer sign-up sheet for the lobby table.
